zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Emma d'Percy於1082年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾惠特比時，她的父親Sir William de Percy Sr49歲，母親Emma Porter44歲。她於1100年之前與Sir Hugo de Malebisse結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1180年在英國英格蘭享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 泊霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: d'Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Emma d'Percy was born in 1082, in Whitby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Percy Sr, was 49 and her mother, Emma Porter, was 44. She married Sir Hugo de Malebisse before 1100. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1180, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in Holy Trinity Churchyard, Low Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Hugo de Malebisse avant 1100. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Emma d'Percyが1082年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウィトビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Percy Srは49歳，母Emma Porterは44歳であった。1100年以前にSir Hugo de Malebisseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1180年にイギリスイギリスで98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロウ ムールホーリー トリニトイ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Acaster Malbis, North Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스
ko.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Acaster Malbis,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 무어 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Emma d'Percy(이)가 1082년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 휘트비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Percy Sr(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Porter(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1100년 이전 Sir Hugo de Malebisse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 무어 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Emma d'Percy родилась в 1082 г. в местности уитби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Percy Sr было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Porter, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugo de Malebisse перед 1100 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурчярд, лоу мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
